knowledge.plot_summary: Big Buck Bunny's peaceful forest routine is disrupted by three mischievous rodents, and he responds with inventive but nonviolent pranks.

relationships.description: Frank and the other rodents antagonize Big Buck Bunny.

events.description: The rodents disrupt Big Buck Bunny's peaceful day.

timeline_positions.description: Big Buck Bunny's quiet forest routine.
The rodents' pranks lead Big Buck Bunny to respond.

observations.raw_florence_caption: The image is a digital illustration of a large pink cloud in the sky. The cloud is fluffy and appears to be floating in the air. The sky is a light blue color with a few wispy clouds scattered across it. On the right side of the image, there are trees with green leaves, and on the left side, there is a body of water. The overall mood of the illustration is peaceful and serene.
interactions: The sky is a light blue color with a few wispy clouds scattered across it
there are trees with green leaves

observations.raw_florence_caption: The image shows a small bird perched on a thin branch of a tree. The bird is grey in color and has a yellow beak and feet. It is facing towards the right side of the image and appears to be singing or dancing. The background is a blue sky with white clouds and green trees. The tree trunk is visible on the left side and the branch is bare.
interactions: The background is a blue sky with white clouds and green trees

observations.raw_florence_caption: The image is a digital illustration of a rabbit in a field of green grass.
